description: Networking IP update rejects a malformed address once confirmed, then PUTs the rdns change. The no-confirm text and missing-rdns message diverge between languages (see report).

cases.name: rejects a malformed address once confirmed
cases.expect_error: address must be a valid IP address

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This updates reverse DNS for an IP address. Set confirm=true to proceed.
